mapper.select: SELECT n.NOTICE_NO ,n.NOTICE_TITLE ,n.NOTICE_CONTENT ,n.NOTICE_COUNT ,m.MEMBER_ID FROM notice n Join MEMBER m USING(MEMBER_NO) WHERE n.NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo} AND n.DEL_YN = 'N'

SELECT n.NOTICE_NO ,m.MEMBER_NAME ,n.NOTICE_TITLE ,n.NOTICE_CONTENT ,n.NOTICE_COUNT ,n.CREATE_DATE ,(SELECT IMG_PATH || SAVE_NAME FROM MEMBER_IMG WHERE MEMBER_NO = n.MEMBER_NO AND DEL_YN = 'N') AS PROFILE_IMAGE FROM NOTICE n JOIN MEMBER m ON (n.MEMBER_NO = m.MEMBER_NO) WHERE n.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY n.NOTICE_NO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NOTICE WHERE DEL_YN = 'N'

SELECT M.MEMBER_NAME , N.NOTICE_TITLE , N.NOTICE_CONTENT , N.NOTICE_COUNT , N.CREATE_DATE
FROM NOTICE N
JOIN MEMBER M
ON N.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO
WHERE N.NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo}

SELECT n.NOTICE_NO ,m.MEMBER_NAME ,n.NOTICE_TITLE ,n.NOTICE_COUNT ,n.CREATE_DATE ,(SELECT IMG_PATH || SAVE_NAME FROM MEMBER_IMG WHERE MEMBER_NO = n.MEMBER_NO AND DEL_YN = 'N') AS PROFILE_IMAGE FROM NOTICE n JOIN MEMBER m ON (n.MEMBER_NO = m.MEMBER_NO) WHERE n.DEL_YN = 'N' AND ( m.MEMBER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR n.NOTICE_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR n.NOTICE_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ) ORDER BY n.NOTICE_NO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTICE SET NOTICE_COUNT = NOTICE_COUNT + 1 WHERE NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo}
